prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Hey, I get it—putting off a tough task all morning can feel overwhelming, but you're stronger than you think. Remember, the hardest part is just getting started, and once you do, you'll build momentum and feel that rush of accomplishment. Take a deep breath, dive in right now, and show yourself what you're capable of—you've got this! 💪
